---
title: 'Multispectral Scheimpflug: Imaging Degraded Books that Open less than 30 Degrees'
author:
- Gregory Heyworth
- Keith T. Knox
- Kenneth Boydston
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- comp_human
url_source: https://library.imaging.org/archiving/articles/19/1/1
journ: IS&T Archiving
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 63
---
